loop1.title: Fuel Tank Anatomy
loop1.note: This card renders its metadata frame (Fuel Tank Anatomy) but has no fuel-specific data fields (level, rate, temp, autonomy, efficiency) because the DG-1 meter is an electrical meter that does not log fuel quantities.

loop1.title: All Runs (Fuel Log)
loop1.note: Showing total energy and average load factor — fuel volume, run hours, start counts, and fault statuses are not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Fuel & Tank — Composite
loop1.note: Showing active power and energy trends — fuel level, burn rate, and temperature are not measured for this asset.
